Desmanthus bilunulatus is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is commonly referred to as a type of flowering plant or shrub.

The health benefits of Desmanthus bilunulatus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues.

uses: Desmanthus insularis, also known as Island Fleabane, has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits.
